title: Volcano Fire
lesson: The volcano rumbles! These are long sentences. Take your time and read every word!
sentences: The cat can nap on the bed.
We can play in the big yard.
The fish can swim fast in water.
The girl can help you with that.
He lost his hat at the park.
We sang a long song at camp.
The frog hid well in the mud.
She got the best score on test.
The bird sat on top of her.
He went past the big red barn.
We had lunch and then went out.
The duck can swim in the pond.
She put on her long red shirt.
He can run fast just like that.
The dog and cat sat with him.
